case_title: INTERIEUR TOUCH VS MORI, JAMES S.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERIEUR TOUCH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORI, JAMES S. $4,487.50 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,509.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MORI, JAMES S. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT INTERIEUR TOUCH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MORI, JAMES S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT INTERIEUR TOUCH CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY DEFECTS IN FILING AND SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MORI, JAMES S.
